# @qijenchen/design-system

> World-class React design system(Radix/shadcn + Tailwind v4 + 自訂 design token)。
> 54 components + 4 public patterns + design tokens。v0.1.0-beta.63。

本檔由 source(spec.md frontmatter + Storybook index)build-time 自動生成,**禁手改**(CI --check drift gate 守)。
每元件 / pattern 的完整 variants / sizes / 禁止事項 全文見 [llms-full.txt](./llms-full.txt)。
元件原始範例 source:node_modules/@qijenchen/design-system/src/<dir>/*.stories.tsx;rendered:Storybook 連結。

## Components
- [Accordion](https://ajenchen-design-system.netlify.app): 見 Storybook / spec — src:components/Accordion

## Patterns
- [action-bar](https://ajenchen-design-system.netlify.app): 跨元件 anatomy / 設計參照 pattern — src:patterns/action-bar
- [element-anatomy](https://ajenchen-design-system.netlify.app): 跨元件 anatomy / 設計參照 pattern — src:patterns/element-anatomy
- [header-canonical](https://ajenchen-design-system.netlify.app): 跨元件 anatomy / 設計參照 pattern — src:patterns/header-canonical
- [ResizeHandle](https://ajenchen-design-system.netlify.app): 跨元件 anatomy / 設計參照 pattern — src:patterns/resize-handle
